name: @radzor/audio-mix
description: Mix, trim, and concatenate audio tracks using FFmpeg subprocess. Supports volume adjustment, format conversion, and metadata extraction for server-side audio processing.

inputs.name: outputDir
inputs.description: Default output directory for processed audio files.

outputs.name: mixResult
outputs.description: Result of an audio processing operation.

fields.name: outputPath
fields.description: Path to the output audio file.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Duration of the output in seconds.

events.name: onMixComplete
events.description: Fired when an audio processing operation completes.

actions.name: mix

params.name: tracks
params.description: Array of audio tracks to mix together.

params.name: outputPath
params.description: Path for the output mixed file.

params.name: options
params.description: Mixing options (output format, sample rate, etc.).

actions.description: Mix multiple audio tracks into a single output file.

actions.name: trim

params.name: inputPath
params.description: Path to the input audio file.

params.name: outputPath
params.description: Path for the trimmed output file.

actions.description: Trim an audio file to a specific time range.

params.name: inputPaths
params.description: Ordered list of audio file paths to concatenate.

params.name: outputPath
params.description: Path for the concatenated output file.

actions.name: adjustVolume

params.name: inputPath
params.description: Path to the input audio file.

actions.description: Adjust the volume of an audio file.

actions.name: getMetadata
actions.description: Get metadata (duration, format, bitrate, etc.) from an audio file.

connectsTo.description: Upload mixed audio to cloud storage

llm.constraints: Requires FFmpeg and FFprobe installed on the system. Server-only (uses child_process). Operations are synchronous per job; queue externally for high throughput.
